mcp-nixos.description: Query NixOS packages, options, Home Manager, nix-darwin, flakes

vault-readonly.description: Read-only access to Obsidian vault (IMPORTANT: must be absolute path, e.g. /home/user/kryonix-vault)

github.description: GitHub issues, PRs, commits, file access (IMPORTANT: set token in .env, not here)

kryonix-brain.description: LightRAG-based knowledge graph + Obsidian search (IMPORTANT: cwd must be project root, e.g. /home/user/kryonix)
